brand.aboutText:
I am an Architect with experience in building design and site management, architectural visualization and 3D, BIM modeling and coordination. Over time I evolved toward Fullstack Development, specializing in this area. I see a shared essence between constructing buildings and writing code: both require design, planning, and structured problem solving.

My transition into development started by building automation tools (Python, Dynamo) and BIM web apps (IFC.js, Three.js). Today I apply that same engineering mindset to build modern applications with the MERN stack, Next.js, and AI-assisted workflows.
brand.aboutStatement: I bring a multidisciplinary perspective that connects digital construction with software architecture, designing robust solutions from database to interface.

links.label: Projects
links.description: Real cases, BIM, digital twins, and technical deliveries for AEC projects.

contactForm.errorTurnstileDomain: The current domain is not authorized in Cloudflare Turnstile (error 110200). In Turnstile dashboard → your widget → Hostname management, add localhost for development and your production domain.

hero.subtitle: My approach combines an analytical profile with a strong digital mindset. I handle projects from spatial conception to modeling, management, and automation. I specialize in the AECO ecosystem and in building tools with tangible impact on decision-making and time optimization. I am not a programmer in the strict sense: I am a professional who uses programming to build solutions that integrate design, data, digitalization, and AI.

items.name: Control Manager
items.description: Desktop plugin for Revit that centralizes validation rules (standards and project parameters), runs batch checks, and generates technical reports for coordination review, with a WPF interface to inspect results without leaving the BIM environment.
items.context: BIM teams were spending too much time manually validating standards and parameters in large Revit models.
items.impact: Reduced review time by 65% and lowered delivery errors in BIM coordination.
items.role: I designed the plugin architecture, implemented validation rules, and automated technical reports.

items.name: Ribbon Revit
items.description: A PyRevit command ribbon that groups modeling, documentation, and QA scripts in one place. Workflows share project conventions and in-Revit feedback messages, aligning the team and reducing ad-hoc scripts.
items.context: The team used isolated scripts without a central interface for recurring workflows.
items.impact: Standardized daily tasks and reduced adoption curve for internal automations by 40%.
items.role: I designed the ribbon UX and developed Python commands for common BIM operations.

items.name: LOL Match
items.description: Fullstack application that consolidates recent match history, champion metrics, and role comparisons in one view. It includes visualizations to detect trends and improve pick and playstyle decisions, with controlled-test deployment.
items.context: Amateur players lacked a unified view to compare recent performance by role and champion.
items.impact: 30% increase in weekly retention during closed tests with positive analytics feedback.
items.role: I built frontend and backend, defined statistics queries, and set up continuous deployment.

items.name: Stockearly
items.description: Inventory system with stock movements, thresholds, alerts, and input/output traceability. It replaces scattered spreadsheets with a clear domain model, stable API, and browser-based operational panel.
items.context: Small businesses managed inventory in spreadsheets with high mismatch rates.
items.impact: Reduced stockouts by 35% and improved daily movement traceability.
items.role: I led domain modeling, implemented inventory API, and built alert dashboard.

items.name: IFC Viewer
items.summary: Online 3D viewer with ThatOpen Engine and Three.js
items.description: Web viewer that loads IFC models, orbits and focuses the building, applies visibility and selection, and adds inspection layers for team review. Built with ThatOpen Engine and Three.js for remote coordination without desktop viewers.
items.context: Clients and technical teams needed to review IFC models on the web without desktop software dependencies.
items.impact: Accelerated coordination reviews by 50% by centralizing comments in a shared viewer.
items.role: I implemented model loading/navigation, element filters, and technical inspection layers.

items.name: Data Extractor
items.description: Pipeline on Autodesk Platform Services that extracts properties and lightweight geometry from cloud models, normalizes schema, and exports structured formats for reporting, BI, or storage, with traces by discipline and model version.
items.context: BIM property extraction for reports was manual and lacked historical traceability.
items.impact: Automated exports and reduced report generation from hours to minutes by discipline.
items.role: I developed extraction pipeline, data mapping, and structured export for analysis.

items.name: MSc. Architecture, Design, and Architectural Engineering
items.meta: National University of San Juan, Argentina · 2006 – 2015
items.description: Architect degree (6 years): structural design, construction systems, urban planning, and architectural engineering.

items.name: Master in BIM-Oriented Programming
items.description: ARCH, STR, MEP, and IFC modeling. Scripting with Dynamo and Python. Databases. Revit API.

items.name: Master BIM Software Developer
items.description: BIM web app development with IFC.js and Three.js. Open BIM standards and IFC schema.

items.name: PyRevit and Revit API Course
items.description: Custom tools and automations using Revit API and PyRevit framework.

items.name: Master in Fullstack Development
items.description: Web development, software engineering, AI integrations, and automation (n8n, MCP servers). Applied to BIM tool development: REST APIs, database modeling, and front-end interfaces for BIM data.

items.name: Autodesk Authorized Developer
items.meta: Autodesk Developer Network (ADN) member · ID: SEES0029
items.description: I build integrations, automations, and custom solutions based on official Autodesk technologies and APIs.
